exportedWorkspace: An fitar da wurin aiki azaman fayil ɗin Hanji.
exportedWorkspaceWithPlaceholders: An fitar da wurin aiki azaman fayil ɗin Hanji — an bar haɗe-haɗe a matsayin wuraren riƙe.
couldntExportWorkspace: Ba a iya fitar da workspace ba.
couldntSwitchWorkspace: Ba a iya canza workspace ba
couldntCreateWorkspace: Ba a iya ƙirƙirar workspace ba
couldntCreatePage: Ba a iya ƙirƙirar shafi ba
cantCopyPageHere: Ba za a iya kwafin shafi a nan ba
cantMovePageHere: Ba za a iya motsa shafi a nan ba
couldntCopyPage: Ba a iya kwafin shafi ba
couldntMovePage: Ba a iya motsa shafi ba
cantCopyBlocksHere: Ba za a iya kwafin tubalan a nan ba
cantMoveBlocksHere: Ba za a iya motsa tubalan a nan ba
copiedBlocksToNewPage: An kwafi tubalan zuwa sabon shafi
movedBlocksToNewPage: An motsa tubalan zuwa sabon shafi
couldntCopyBlocks: Ba a iya kwafin tubalan ba
couldntMoveBlocks: Ba a iya motsa tubalan ba
inboxUnread: Akwatin saƙo (sabunta da ba a karanta ba)
inviteMembersDescription: Ƙara asusun uwar garken da ke akwai.

notionOnboarding.body: Shigo da shafuka da bayanan Notion dinka cikin wannan filin aiki.
notionOnboarding.note: Kana iya fara wannan daga baya a kowane lokaci daga Shigo da ke cikin menu na gefe.
notionOnboarding.title: Shigo da filin aikinka na Notion zuwa Hanji?
